subcodes.first_line: Thou hast created, O my God, an all-encompassing universe and a vast existence within an infinite expanse, before whose bounds all minds stand powerless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد خلقت یا الهی کونا جامعا و کیانا واسعا بفضاء غیر متناه قصرت عن حدوده العقول
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @material world a reflection of the spiritual, @call to action
